subcodes.title: Words to Mr. Kinney, spoken on 1909-07-08
subcodes.first_line: Very good; very good. Write a letter and answer it yourself. Look into your heart and see the answer....A day will come when all My communications upon paper -- all My writing – will be effaced.
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
